# C++ Sample Fixture

Parser and indexing tests use this directory as C++ source input. It is test
data, not a language tutorial.

| File | Contract |
| --- | --- |
| `control_flow.cpp` | Branching, ternaries, and loops. |
| `classes.cpp` | Classes, inheritance, and polymorphism. |
| `templates.cpp` | Function templates and specialization. |
| `exceptions.cpp` | Exception handling with `try`/`catch`. |
| `raii_example.cpp` | RAII-style construction and cleanup. |
| `function_chains.cpp` | Function pointers, lambdas, and higher-order calls. |
| `namespaces.cpp` | Namespaces and `using` directives. |
| `stl_usage.cpp` | STL containers and algorithms. |
| `file_io.cpp` | Basic `fstream` input and output. |
| `edge_cases.cpp` | Empty and comment-only parser edge cases. |
